name: fom-viewer
description: Single page HTML viewer for IEEE 1516 FOM files

scripts.build: vite build && cp dist/index.html dist/fom-viewer.html && cp dist/fom-viewer.html fom-viewer.html && for f in dist/fom-worker-*.js; do [ -f "$f" ] && cp "$f" .; done
scripts.build:map: vite build --sourcemap && cp dist/index.html dist/fom-viewer.html && cp dist/fom-viewer.html fom-viewer.html && for f in dist/fom-worker-*.js; do [ -f "$f" ] && cp "$f" .; done
scripts.test:combined: npm run build && cd test && npm run test -- --combined
